title: CSS Gradient Generator
shortDescription: Generate clean CSS gradients with live preview, angle controls and ready-to-copy code.
metaTitle: CSS Gradient Generator - Create Linear and Radial Gradients
metaDescription: Generate CSS gradients online with live preview, angle control, color presets and copy-ready CSS code for linear and radial gradients.
intro: Create modern CSS gradients in seconds. Adjust colors, angle and type, preview the result live, then copy clean CSS for your website or UI.
overview: This CSS gradient generator helps you build linear and radial gradients fast, without writing code by hand. It is useful for backgrounds, buttons, hero sections, cards and UI accents. Choose your colors, tweak the direction, and get production-ready CSS instantly.
howItWorks: Pick one or more colors for your gradient.
Choose linear or radial gradient mode.
Adjust the angle, position or spread if needed.
Preview the gradient live in the tool.
Copy the generated CSS and paste it into your project.
useCases: Create website backgrounds with smooth color transitions.
Generate button, banner and hero section gradients.
Test color combinations before adding them to a design system.
Produce quick CSS snippets for UI mockups and prototypes.
Make radial highlight effects for cards, panels and badges.

examples.title: Linear background
examples.description: A simple diagonal gradient for modern page sections.

examples.title: Radial spotlight
examples.description: A soft radial gradient for light UI highlights.

faq.question: What is a CSS gradient generator?
faq.answer: It is a tool that creates CSS gradient code from selected colors and settings, so you can use it directly in your project.

faq.question: Can I create linear and radial gradients?
faq.answer: Yes. You can generate both linear and radial gradients and copy the CSS instantly.

faq.question: Does the tool show a live preview?
faq.answer: Yes. The preview updates as you change colors, angle and gradient type.

faq.question: Is the generated code ready for production?
faq.answer: Yes. The tool outputs clean CSS that you can paste into your stylesheet or component.
